items.summary: Recompute bolt_dag from unit-of-work-dependency.md when the runtime graph is stale or missing (2.2.14)
items.rationale: Amadeus twice observed the silent single-unit degrade and holds a manual norm workaround (recompile-before-construction-bolt-dag); the upstream fix mechanizes it read-side.
risks: coverage-guard behavior change on stale graphs

items.summary: Approve-time backfill of a skipped gate rejection with Recovered:true audit pair (2.2.11)
items.rationale: Amadeus backfills only an engine-opened gate-start (--recovered); the skipped-rejection backfill and Revision Count reconciliation are absent.
risks: audit provenance semantics; needs falling-proof tests

items.summary: Autonomous swarm advances through every Bolt batch; run-scoped converged reads; finalize skips converged on merge failure (2.2.5)
items.rationale: Amadeus swarm is batch-parameterized and engine-emits invoke-swarm, but the multi-batch autonomous climb and merge-failure guard are unverified; verify first, port the gaps.
risks: may resolve to EQUIVALENT after verification

items.summary: Help-shaped inputs route to help; 'help' reserved record name; safe unknown-intent errors (2.2.1)
items.rationale: Amadeus has a global help case but no verified intent-verb help interception or reserved-name refusal.

items.summary: 24h mtime bound on the compose-pending Stop-hook carve-out plus doctor marker row (2.2.8)
items.rationale: Amadeus has the marker carve-out and autonomy guard but no freshness bound and no doctor surfacing; an orphaned marker permanently disables enforcement.

items.summary: recompose refuses under autonomous Construction (2.2.8)
items.rationale: Amadeus recompose handler has no autonomy check; an unattended run could be reshaped with no human at the gate.

items.summary: Per-intent memory_path in runtime graph and learnings surface (2.2.2)
items.rationale: Amadeus independently reworked the per-intent record layout; the learnings surface consumes per-intent memory paths in daily production use (S13 elections).

items.summary: kind: on units + produces_kinds: stage frontmatter prune the per-unit design matrix (2.2.18)
items.rationale: Reduces per-unit design overhead; requires Amadeus schema/engine/sensor changes and dist regeneration.
risks: schema ripple into all six dists

items.summary: Opt-in Construction Iteration: unit-major walk + set-construction-iteration verb (2.2.13)
items.rationale: Zero-risk default (byte-identical when unset); gives the bolt plan an executable effect on design order.

items.summary: Stage/gate counts at scope confirmation, birth prints, scope-change, validate-grid summary (2.2.12)
items.rationale: Counts read from the compiled grid; informs consent at scope confirm. Additive JSON.

items.summary: Gate Approve options name the computed next in-scope stage via directive next_stage (2.2.6)
items.rationale: Amadeus computes next_stage in state directives; whether gate-option rendering consumes it is unverified — verify, then complete.
risks: may resolve to EQUIVALENT after verification

items.summary: optional_produces: frontmatter exempts conditional artifacts from per-unit coverage (2.2.9)
items.rationale: Already present in Amadeus schema, sensor, and orchestrate paths.

items.summary: Depth-1 fallback scan classifies nested projects Brownfield; Nested Root audit field; incremental-scope advisory (2.2.7)
items.rationale: Prevents skipped reverse-engineering on container-folder projects.

items.summary: .gitmodules as sixth brownfield signal; uninitialized-submodule warnings at birth/doctor/detect (2.2.10)
items.rationale: Prevents Greenfield misclassification for submodule-based workspaces.

items.summary: Adapters respawn hooks via process.execPath instead of bare bun (2.2.3)
items.rationale: Amadeus cursor/codex/kiro/kiro-ide adapters spawn ['bun', ...]; GUI/minimal PATH environments lose the whole hook layer. Apply to all six harnesses including Amadeus-only cursor/opencode.
risks: deeper child spawns remain PATH-dependent (upstream known limitation) — inventory them

items.summary: Kiro IDE adapter reads USER_PROMPT env, audit-tail-gated payload-free hooks, robust path extraction, subagent identity, failed-tool guard, opt-in debug log (2.2.17)
items.rationale: Amadeus kiro-ide adapter still uses the 2s stdin race; the IDE never writes stdin, so context-dependent hooks no-op.
risks: largest harness diff; behavior verified only on real Kiro IDE

items.summary: Double-quote every $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR in shipped Claude settings (2.2.19)
items.rationale: Amadeus Claude settings are unquoted; a workspace path with a space breaks all hooks under word-splitting shells.

items.summary: Rename agent frontmatter modelOverride: to model: (2.2.15)
items.rationale: Amadeus agents already use the real model: key; no modelOverride exists anywhere.

items.summary: Review sections use shell-sourced UTC date and name the reviewer persona; identity marker first line (2.2.4/2.2.17)
items.rationale: Amadeus reviewer templates carry no date-sourcing instruction; reviews risk inferred dates and producer attribution.

items.summary: Bound per-unit reviewer reads to unit artifacts plus directive.consumes shared contracts (2.2.16)
items.rationale: Per-unit review cost grows linearly with unit count without the bound; Amadeus stage-protocol/skills carry no read-scope constraint.
risks: must propagate to all six harness orchestrator skills

items.summary: Stage schema accepts number, name, bundle, when, required_sections; core compiles byte-identically
items.rationale: Root dependency of the plugin mechanism; also shared by unit-kind-pruning schema work.
risks: schema ripple; byte-identical core compile must be proven

items.summary: package.ts discovers plugins/<name>/, emits per-harness host-plugin projections, drift-guards dist/plugins/, plugin build seam
items.rationale: Amadeus packager must derive projections from its six harness manifests (upstream has four).
risks: largest packaging change; orphan sweep must not touch dist/<harness>/

items.summary: Portable compose.ts: no-clobber stage copy, seam merge, idempotent fragment splicing, self-healing recompile, drop records, doctor surfacing
items.rationale: Port under the amadeus namespace and hooks-health dir conventions.
local_evidence: a326f47bc: no compose.ts plugin hook in packages/framework
risks: merge semantics (set-union, hash-idempotent splice) need falling-proof tests

items.summary: plugins/test-pro reference plugin validated across harness projections
items.rationale: Reference plugin proves the mechanism end-to-end; re-project for six harnesses.
verification: plugin tests discovered by integration tier

items.summary: Plugin mechanism reference chapter + authoring guide + deferred-surfaces status list
items.rationale: Write Amadeus-path versions under docs/reference and docs/harness-engineering (English).

items.summary: Re-author upstream t199-t219/t188 and related integration/e2e coverage for adopted items inside Amadeus test layers
items.rationale: Tests accompany their items; honor Amadeus test norms (fs tests in integration tier, coverage registry regen, local lcov pre-push).
upstream_evidence: 55 test paths in the tag diff
local_evidence: a326f47bc:tests/ (Amadeus-native suite; upstream tests not present)

items.summary: Fold adopted-feature documentation updates into Amadeus docs (reference/guide/harness-engineering)
items.rationale: Amadeus docs are independent; adopt content for adopted features only, English, Amadeus paths.
upstream_evidence: 39 docs paths in the tag diff

items.summary: 248 changed/added dist/ paths in the upstream diff
items.rationale: Generated outputs; Amadeus regenerates via bun scripts/package.ts and bun run promote:self, never hand-copies upstream dist.

items.summary: Upstream roadmap.html refresh (2.2.0 docs commit)
items.rationale: Amadeus ships no roadmap.html; upstream-repo-specific document.

items.summary: Upstream CHANGELOG.md/README.md/AGENTS.md edits
items.rationale: Amadeus forbids a hand-written CHANGELOG.md (release notes are generated by release.yml); README/AGENTS are fork-specific.
local_evidence: project Forbidden: never revive hand-written CHANGELOG.md
